response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:56: Identified as an original song 'Hanabira' performed by Inugami Korone and Nekomata Okayu. 2. 00:57-05:00: Identified song 'Time Machine ni Notte' with composer PUNPEE on-screen. 3. Used lyrics for Song 1 from video transcript as no official lyrics found for this short segment. 4. Used searched lyrics for 'Time Machine ni Notte' from Uta-net.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a special 7th anniversary performance by VTubers Inugami Korone and Nekomata Okayu. It includes an opening original song titled 'Hanabira' followed by a performance of the song 'Time Machine ni Notte' by Inugami Korone.

scenes.description: Opening performance by Inugami Korone and Nekomata Okayu with the song 'Hanabira' in front of a cherry blossom tree.
